description:
Name: Leon Vyzovich

Proficiency: Counterintelligence

Birth: Detritus

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: The Fraulein's counterintelligence expert. One of the few biological males in the group, he is assigned to the Cross Group, working separate from the ladies. He is a touted expert in interrogation techniques, but in reality, his best talent is making people trust him, especially his command.
